tasks.title: Sort sidecar_sizes ascending before pyramid cascade loop to prevent upscale from wrong source
tasks.reason_for_tier: One-liner sort insertion before the loop; no design judgment required.

tasks.title: Fix as_ascii to decode inline ASCII values (count <= 4) from value_off bytes
tasks.reason_for_tier: Requires correct TIFF inline-value decoding from little-endian u32 bytes; needs care to avoid introducing endianness bugs.

tasks.title: Move layer_scale blend to linear space after from_log_euclidean in apply_perceptual_constancy
tasks.reason_for_tier: Colour math correctness; needs understanding of log-euclidean space and lerp semantics.

tasks.title: Implement column-trim for Grbg and Bggr CFA patterns in align_to_rggb
tasks.reason_for_tier: Requires building a new contiguous buffer via row-by-row copy with col_off stride; also requires combined row+col trim for Bggr. Non-trivial slice arithmetic.

tasks.title: Fix median() to average middle two elements for even-length arrays in benchmark helpers
tasks.reason_for_tier: Trivial arithmetic fix; same pattern repeated in 3 other bench files.

tasks.title: Fix stddev() to use Bessel-corrected sample variance (N-1) in benchmark helpers
tasks.reason_for_tier: One-line divisor change; guard for len < 2.

tasks.title: Add proptest property-based tests for demosaic CFA phase invariants and tone math monotonicity
tasks.reason_for_tier: Requires adding proptest dependency and writing meaningful generators; moderate complexity.

tasks.title: Expose validate_pixel_buffer as pub(crate) and use it in dng.rs, cr2.rs, and lib.rs decode paths
tasks.reason_for_tier: Visibility change + call-site updates; mechanical.

tasks.title: Replace gratuitous unsafe pointer write in decompress hot loop with safe slice indexing
tasks.reason_for_tier: Mechanical safe-indexing substitution; invariants are already met.

tasks.title: Add SAFETY comment and strengthen debug_assert for get_unchecked in demosaic at() helper
tasks.reason_for_tier: Add SAFETY comment; optionally convert to safe indexing. Trivial.

tasks.title: Add SAFETY comment with invariant documentation for pointer-arithmetic deinterleave in demosaic_rggb_planar
tasks.reason_for_tier: Add SAFETY comment and debug_assert invariants; no logic change required.

tasks.title: Replace hardcoded absolute path in CR2 tests with env-var + skip-on-missing pattern
tasks.reason_for_tier: Mechanical env-var substitution; pattern already present elsewhere in codebase.

tasks.title: Replace personal photo path PII in lib.rs integration test with env-var + skip-on-missing
tasks.reason_for_tier: Trivial env-var substitution.

tasks.title: Investigate and document WASM SIMD v128_load alignment semantics; add comment if unaligned access is safe per spec
tasks.reason_for_tier: Requires spec verification (WASM SIMD spec says v128.load supports unaligned); add comment confirming this or fix if uncertain.

tasks.title: Fix RefCell borrow spanning PerceptualGrid::new() in thread_local to prevent poisoning on panic
tasks.reason_for_tier: Requires restructuring the lazy-init pattern so construction occurs outside the borrow_mut scope.

tasks.title: Propagate cancellation flag into rayon::join sibling closures to prevent full encode after cancel
tasks.reason_for_tier: Requires restructuring the parallel encode to check cancel before each variant begins, and potentially using a shared AtomicBool to signal siblings.

tasks.title: Call JxlDecoderCloseInput after JxlDecoderSetInput in decode_progressive_frames_borrowed
tasks.reason_for_tier: One-line fix mirroring run_full_into pattern.

tasks.title: Add SAFETY comment to decompress_rows_into unsafe pointer write explaining split_at_mut aliasing invariant
tasks.reason_for_tier: Comment-only change; or trivial safe-indexing substitution.

tasks.title: Add AtomicBool cancellation check every N rows in rayon demosaic and pipeline par_chunks_mut loops
tasks.reason_for_tier: Requires API design decision: where does the cancel token come from, what is the granularity, how does early-exit propagate through rayon.

tasks.title: Return Err instead of silently padding when rgb_write_row != ah after tile decode
tasks.reason_for_tier: Replace empty if block with Err return; one line.

tasks.title: Add JxlDecoderCloseInput call in decode_progressive_frames_borrowed after SetInput
tasks.reason_for_tier: One-line fix identical to concurrency-5; these tasks may be merged.

tasks.title: Add null check on JxlThreadParallelRunnerCreate result in Decoder::new; error or fallback to scalar
tasks.reason_for_tier: Add null check and return Err or log fallback; trivial.

tasks.title: Propagate per-tile decode errors in decode_jxtc_region instead of silently zeroing failed regions
tasks.reason_for_tier: Requires redesigning the map_init closure return type to carry errors and deciding on fail-fast vs partial-result semantics.

tasks.title: Add 512-entry cap to walk_inner IFD entry_count to match cr2.rs DoS guard
tasks.reason_for_tier: One-line guard matching existing pattern in cr2.rs.

tasks.title: Change box_downscale_rgba8 to return Result and propagate error on size mismatch
tasks.reason_for_tier: Requires changing function signature and updating all call sites to propagate the new Result.

tasks.title: Add maximum output size cap to encode_inner grow-loop to prevent unbounded OOM on NeedMoreOutput
tasks.reason_for_tier: Add size guard before resize; one line with a sensible constant (e.g. 4 GB).

tasks.title: Fix chrono_now() month computation to use cumulative day table instead of naive doy/30
tasks.reason_for_tier: Replace naive doy/30 with a month lookup table; trivial.

tasks.title: Implement ct6_progressive_dc2_truncated_stream test with real truncated JXL stream
tasks.reason_for_tier: Requires encoding a real JXL, truncating at offsets, and asserting error (not panic); moderate effort.

tasks.title: ADR: Define crate-level RawPipelineError enum with thiserror and migrate anyhow/String error sites
tasks.reason_for_tier: Cross-cutting API design decision affecting multiple files; needs careful design of error variants before mechanical migration.

tasks.title: Emit DecodeEvent::Final in decode_progressive after run_progressive_into returns
tasks.reason_for_tier: Requires understanding the decode_progressive event loop and inserting Final emission at the correct terminal point.

tasks.title: Fix bench_tone_stage_3way to use pre_g and pre_b for G and B channels respectively
tasks.reason_for_tier: Replace pre_r with pre_g/pre_b at the two wrong call sites; trivial.

tasks.title: Promote debug_assert for rgb16.len() % 3 == 0 to release-mode assert in process() and process_into()
tasks.reason_for_tier: Change debug_assert! to assert!; one-line change per site.

tasks.reason_for_tier: Single constant change; trivial.

tasks.reason_for_tier: Requires encoding a multi-channel JXL test fixture and comparing decode vs decode_into output.

tasks.title: Log JXTC version mismatch with actual version number instead of silent None return
tasks.reason_for_tier: Add eprintln/log warning with actual version; trivial.

tasks.title: Add caller-supplied scratch buffer parameter to rgba_to_rgb to avoid per-encode 60MB allocation

tasks.title: Replace full-buffer has_meaningful_alpha scan with sampled heuristic (every 256th pixel)
tasks.reason_for_tier: Replace .any() with sampled step_by check; trivial.

tasks.title: Remove Instant::now() and eprintln timing from perceptual_apply_bulk production hot path
